mapper.select: select sku_id, spu_id, price_fee, stock, status from sku where sku_id = #{skuId}
select sku_id, spu_id, price_fee, stock, status from sku where spu_id = #{spuId}
select sku_id, spu_id, price_fee, stock, status from sku where spu_id = #{spuId}
mapper.insert: insert into sku (spu_id, price_fee, stock, status) values (#{spuId}, #{priceFee}, #{stock}, #{status})
mapper.update: update sku set price_fee = #{priceFee}, stock = #{stock}, status = #{status} where sku_id = #{skuId}
